error_signature: number format not transforming in Google Sheets
title: Number format not transforming in Google Sheets
symptom: When attempting to format numbers with different decimal separators in Google Sheets, the output remains unchanged despite using the replace function.
applies_when: Input numbers have varying decimal separators
not_this_if: Input numbers are already in a consistent format
root_cause: The issue arises because the replace function may not be correctly applied to the input data, leading to no transformation of the number format in Google Sheets. This can happen if the syntax is incorrect or if the input data does not match the expected format.
fix_steps: Open the Google Sheets node settings
Use the replaceAll() function correctly, e.g., '{{ $json['Valor total'].replaceAll(',', '.')}}'
Test the workflow to ensure the number formats are transformed correctly
agent_instruction: Ensure to use the correct replaceAll() syntax in the Google Sheets node to transform number formats.
